operator.job: Consume verifiable holdings and metadata over HTTP or MCP without rebuilding the sonar-to-metadata join.

object.description: The sovereign read-side inventory building for holdings, owned NFTs, metadata, and ACVP completeness envelopes.

question: What does this wallet hold, and how complete and fresh is that inventory claim?
responsibility: Join indexed holdings with owned metadata and return consumer-ready inventory records with completeness provenance.

consumers.name: loa-freeside
consumers.need: Holdings evidence with explicit completeness for composed member reads.

consumers.name: freeside-dashboard
consumers.need: Inventory and collection context without direct chain or metadata-vendor calls.

consumers.name: agent consumers
consumers.need: The same holdings capability through a typed MCP surface.

trust.note: OpenAPI and MCP artifacts are emitted from the same route declarations; completeness still depends on upstream sonar freshness and registered metadata.

owns: Consumer-ready holdings and NFT metadata reads.
The ACVP completeness envelope for inventory results.
does_not_own: Raw chain indexing or RPC truth.
Metadata storage ownership or dashboard presentation.
boundaries.missing_capability_handoff: Add the missing inventory route or schema at this building; do not query chain providers directly from the BFF or UI.

flow_moments.contribution: Produce holdings, collection, and metadata facts with completeness envelopes for person and cohort receipts.
